prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-ASRO-BKTSLCGPKIT-20PC-BLK-AMZ Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 20pc Complete Gold Panning Kit with 50 Inch Folding Sluice Box and 5 Gallon Bucket, Black Description: If you're looking for a start to finish sluice box gold prospecting kit, look no further than the ASR Outdoor 20pc Complete Sluice Box Gold Panning Kit. Intended for end to end raw material processing, this kit includes a comprehensive selection of prospecting tools needed for classification, collection and storage.

And, while the 50 inch folding sluice and five gallon bucket make this kit incredibly portable, the supplementary components we've included ensure you're never compromising on the range of prospecting tools or processes needed for a successful day in the field. So, how is this kit going to cover end to end processing? Let's start with the five gallon bucket and classifier screens (1/2 and 1/8 inch).

The bucket has been designed to work seamlessly with the stackable sifting screens; when layered on top of the pail, you've now created an effective classification system to remove undesirable material from your pay dirt concentrate. But, before you start panning or sluicing, grab that large 16lb magnetic separator tool; this will help to remove black sand and any other heavy magnetic materials, making it much easier to separate and extract gold.

Whether you choose to feed your river sluice or work on gold panning techniques, you've got both options with this kit. The 50 inch folding gold sluice box features 18 gauge steel and zinc plated riffles built right into the sediment channel, alongside preinstalled woven vinyl miner's moss, meaning no assembly is required and it's ready to go right out of the box. Alternatively, the gold pans included are dual riffle with both a shallow and deep sidewall riffle design; they measure 10, 12 and 14 inches, are molded from one piece of high impact ABS plastic, are lightweight, rust resistant and buoyant in water.

If you're lucky enough to spot gold, you can use the included snifter bottles to extract gold flakes or nuggets and store them in the screw top glass vials for safe keeping Search Terms: gold panning kit beginner prospecting starter set sluice equipment mining hobby paydirt recovery river creek dredge classifier snuffer bottle suction tweezers vial field gear outdoors adventure treasure alaska california nevada colorado Features: - GOLD PANNING KIT: ASR Outdoors complete gold sluice box kit with five gallon bucket and large classifier screens intended for start to finish raw material processing; 20pc kit includes everything for collection, recovery and storage and is easily portable - GOLD SLUICE BOX: 50 inch aluminum sluice box folds down to just 15 inches in length and comes with carpet, woven vinyl miners moss and shoulder strap installed; gold sluice box fits inside five gallon bucket as secondary carrying option - 5 GALLON BUCKET: Heavy duty plastic bucket with carry handle works in conjunction with large classifier screens; stack sifting screens on top of bucket to create a seamless material classification system, ideal for then feeding into your sluice box - PROSPECTING TOOLS: Kit includes 16lb magnetic separating tool for removing black sand and other magnetic materials from your deposit; kit also comes with 10, 12 and 14 inch dual riffle gold pans as another means for retrieving gold - SPECIFICATIONS: Kit Dimensions: 19.5 x 14 x 14 inches; Kit Weight: 16.20lbs; Materials: Aluminum, Plastic, Glass; Color: Assorted; Classifier Screens: 1/8 and 1/2 inches === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
